scripts.dev:all: npm run infra:up && concurrently -k --names commerce,storefront,ops-api --prefix-colors blue,green,magenta "npm:dev:commerce" "npm:dev:storefront:wait" "npm:dev:ops-api"
scripts.dev:full: npm run infra:up && concurrently -k --names commerce,storefront,ops-api,chat,workers --prefix-colors blue,green,magenta,yellow,gray "npm:dev:commerce" "npm:dev:storefront:wait" "npm:dev:ops-api" "npm:dev:chat" "npm:dev:workers:wait"
scripts.dev:storefront:wait: node ./scripts/wait-for-http.mjs --url http://localhost:9000/health --label commerce -- npm run dev -w @blinds/storefront
scripts.dev:workers:wait: node ./scripts/wait-for-http.mjs --url http://localhost:9000/health --label commerce -- npm run dev -w @blinds/workers
